name: Apple Quince Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the apples and remove stems, seeds, and blossom ends without peeling them.
2. Cut the apples into quarters and cover with water. Cook until very soft and drain through a jelly bag.
3. Wash the quinces and remove stems, seeds, and blossom ends without peeling them.
4. Cut the quinces into small pieces and cover with water. Cook slowly until very soft and drain through a jelly bag.
5. Combine the apple and quince juices in equal proportions.
6. Use 2/3 cup of sugar for each cup of juice. Stir over high heat until the jelly forms sheets when a spoon is lifted out.
Note: The Household Searchlight
